about_summary: 👋 I am Jihoon Chae, a Full-stack Developer committed to delivering end-to-end, production-ready services. From frontend development using React and React Native to backend APIs with Spring Boot and Node.js, and real-time services via WebSockets, I build every layer with purpose. I don't just 'make things work'; I constantly ask 'why this technology?' and 'how can we improve the architecture and user experience?'

about_sections.title: User Experience-Driven Frontend Development
details: Focused on designing web and mobile UIs using React and React Native, prioritizing user flow and seamless interaction.
Improved usability in my graduation project by redesigning search and category structures based on actual user survey data.
Dedicated to creating 'easy-to-use' services through TypeScript, responsive layouts, and performance optimization (lazy loading, minimizing unnecessary renders).

about_sections.title: Problem-Solving with a Completionist Mindset
details: I make it a rule to identify shortcomings in one project and resolve them in the next.

I have consistently verified the process of **'Identifying pain points → Implementing solutions → Validating improvements'** by refactoring JS projects into TypeScript, migrating build environments to Vite, and architecturally resolving redundant data/logic.
Through this process, I have naturally developed a keen sense for code quality, maintainability, and performance.

about_sections.title: Data-Driven Decision Making
details: I rely on data rather than intuition to make development decisions.
Analyzed user survey results to prioritize features in my graduation project and optimized UI/data flow by analyzing API response patterns in personal projects.
Developed a strong appreciation for the importance of evidence-based development through data analysis projects involving YouTube and IMDB datasets.

about_conclusion: I aim for development that solves problems for users, not just for the sake of the technology itself. I am a developer who learns quickly in new environments and constantly strives to grow by considering better architectural structures.

projects.title: Graduation Project - Photographer & Client Matching Platform
projects.description:
**Team Project | Frontend (React Native)**

A mobile-based matching service connecting photographers and clients. Developed as a production-level MVP including style filters, booking systems, and a review community.

### What I built
- Implemented overall mobile UI using React Native
- Developed screens for photographer discovery, portfolios, bookings, and community
- Managed frontend state considering JWT-based authentication flows

### Key features
- Category-based photographer search and detailed portfolio viewing
- Booking request/acceptance flow (Client ↔ Photographer)
- Community board with review and comment functionality

### Technical focus
- Optimized UX for loading/error states considering mobile API latency
- Applied FlatList lazy rendering and server-side pagination
- Collaborative development using Git Flow (PRs and code reviews)

### Takeaway
- Experienced how UX and performance are directly linked in mobile environments
- Developed the habit of designing user flows before implementing features
- Learned the critical importance of role division and communication in team projects

projects.title: Nobel Prize Winners Explorer (TypeScript Refactoring)
projects.description:
**Personal Project | Frontend (React · TypeScript)**

A web service designed to explore Nobel Prize data by year, category, and laureate. Focused on providing a 'data discovery experience' rather than just displaying information.

### What I built
- Designed and implemented the web application using React + TypeScript
- Handled API data parsing, state management, and UI architecture
- Conducted a full refactor from JavaScript to TypeScript for better maintainability

### Key Features
- Explore Nobel laureates by category and year
- User-friendly data exploration via search and filtering
- Structured information delivery through an intuitive card UI

### Technical Focus
- Secured type stability and reduced runtime errors through TypeScript refactoring
- Improved UI reusability through component responsibility decoupling
- Handled exceptions (network failure, empty data) common in API-dependent services

### Takeaway
- Gained practical experience in migrating a JavaScript codebase to TypeScript
- Strengthened design sense by prioritizing **'Intuitive Data Experience'** over just 'Good-looking UI'
- Realized that even small projects benefit significantly from structured architectural design

projects.title: Data Analysis - YouTube Channel Revenue Optimization
projects.description:
**Role: Data Collection · Analysis · Visualization**

Collected YouTube API data to analyze metrics such as views, subscriber growth, video length, and upload days to derive insights for content strategy and revenue optimization.

### What I did
- Collected large-scale data via YouTube API and loaded into a DB
- Performed data cleaning and Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) using Python
- Designed Tableau dashboards for core KPI visualization

### Key Insights
- Identified meaningful patterns between upload days and view counts
- Analyzed the impact of video length on watch time and revenue
- Confirmed that views and revenue are not always proportional, providing hints for ad revenue optimization

### Technical Focus
- Designed a batch request + MySQL storage structure to overcome API rate limits
- Redesigned the UI to be decision-maker friendly by focusing on core KPIs
- Handled outliers and data cleaning to ensure data reliability

### Takeaway
- Experienced the full end-to-end data pipeline from collection to visualization
- Learned what constitutes 'analysis that aids decision-making' rather than just 'interesting analysis'
- Expanded my ability to interpret data from a business perspective

projects.title: Data Analysis - IMDB Box Office Factors Analysis
projects.description:
**Role: Data Analysis · Visualization**

Quantitatively identified factors influencing movie success and genre trends based on IMDB public data including ratings, vote counts, budget, and revenue.

### What I did
- Collected large-scale IMDB datasets and designed MySQL storage structures
- Performed data preprocessing and EDA using Python
- Built intuitive analysis dashboards using Tableau

### Key Insights
- Identified patterns of high-efficiency, low-budget movies via ROI analysis
- Analyzed correlations between ratings and vote counts, finding stronger influences in specific genres
- Visualized popularity trends by genre over time to identify market patterns

### Technical Focus
- Resolved issues with datasets containing many missing values and outliers via Python-based cleaning
- Optimized Tableau dashboard performance by pre-aggregating data at the SQL level

### Takeaway
- Built end-to-end data analysis experience from collection to cleaning and visualization
- Strengthened visualization skills to deliver data with a 'story' for the user
- Established a mindset of aiding decision-making through data interpretation

projects.title: Spring Boot Board Web Application
projects.description:
**Role: Backend Developer**

Built a backend for a board application using Spring Boot and JPA, featuring posts, comments, and member management. Focused on understanding the differences between traditional MVC and REST API architectures.

### What I did
- Implemented board, comment, and like features using Spring Boot
- Applied Spring Security for authentication/authorization and session management
- Designed a structure supporting both REST API and MVC
- Verified APIs using Postman

### Main Features
- **Membership**: Sign-up/Login, session-based auth, BCrypt password encryption
- **Board**: CRUD operations with comment and like integration
- **Security**: Role-based access control and secure authentication filters

### Technical Focus
- **MVC + REST API Coexistence**: Managed FilterChain priorities to resolve authentication conflicts
- **Security Deep Dive**: Resolved authentication object issues in test environments to deepen understanding of Spring Security internals
- **Structural Design**: Gained experience in JPA entity relationships, transaction flow, and data integrity

### Takeaway
- Learned the rationale behind architectural choices by experiencing MVC limitations vs. REST API advantages
- Established the concept of 'API-First Design' and data contracts with clients
- Strengthened practical security sense through Spring Security implementation

projects.title: Spring Boot RESTful Board API
projects.description:
**Role: Backend Developer**

Designed and implemented a complete RESTful API service using Spring Boot and JWT. Focused on building a production-ready backend by applying JWT auth, permission validation, and DRY principles.

### What I did
- Implemented JWT-based authentication/authorization
- Developed APIs for Members, Posts, Comments, and Likes
- Strengthened data security through ownership verification
- Refactored for improved structure and reduced redundancy

### Technical Focus
- **Spring Security + JWT**: Designed a stateless authentication flow using custom FilterChains
- **@AuthenticationPrincipal**: Safely passed user information from the security context to controllers
- **Ownership Verification**: Implemented business logic to ensure only owners can modify or delete data
- **JPA + MySQL**: Designed data mapping and stable processing for production DB environments

### Takeaway
- Fully understood and implemented token-based authentication beyond mere theory
- Experienced the full backend development process including security-integrated API design
- Realized that maintainability is the lifeblood of code through rigorous refactoring

projects.title: Real-time Multi-language Translation Chat
projects.description:
**Role: Full-stack Developer**

A chat platform utilizing WebSockets and the Google Translation API to enable real-time translated communication between users speaking different languages.

### What I Did
- Designed and implemented a bidirectional communication structure using Socket.IO
- Integrated Google Translation API with auto-detection and translation logic
- Ensured data persistence for chat logs using MongoDB
- Built a responsive real-time chat UI/UX

### Technical Focus
- **Real-time Optimization**: Decoupled Socket.IO event handlers to minimize communication latency
- **API Integration**: Implemented robust exception handling for external API timeouts and quotas
- **Data Modeling**: Leveraged MongoDB's flexibility to design efficient schemas for messages and timestamps
- **Asynchronous Flow**: Managed async flows between high message volumes and translation processing

### Takeaway
- Deeply understood and implemented real-time data processing mechanisms via WebSockets
- Acquired skills in integrating external cloud services (GCP) into production environments
- Enhanced full-stack troubleshooting and service design capabilities

experience.title: Full-stack Developer
technologies: Full service cycle experience from planning to deployment

technologies: Mobile app development using React Native
